In [366]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
In [367]:
EGOV_Index = pd.read_csv("EGOV_Index_Cleaned.csv")
Internet_Index = pd.read_csv("Internet_Index.csv")
Digital_Payments_Index = pd.read_csv("Digital_Payments_Index.csv")
Financial_Inclusion_Index = pd.read_csv("Financial_Inclusion_Index.csv")

In [369]:
EGOV_Index = EGOV_Index[[
    "Country_Code",
    "Country", 
    "Year",
    "OSI_Value",
    "TII_Value",
    "HCI_Value",
    "E_GOV_Index"
]]

EGOV_Index["Year"].unique()
Out[370]:
array([2003, 2004, 2005, 2008, 2010, 2012, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2020, 2022,
       2024])
In [371]:
Years_filter = [2016, 2018, 2020, 2022, 2016, 2018, 2020, 2022, 2024]

EGOV_Index = EGOV_Index[EGOV_Index["Year"].isin(Years_filter)]

In [374]:
EGOV_Index["Country"] = EGOV_Index["Country"].replace({
    "Egypt" : "Egypt, Arab Rep."
})
In [375]:
Internet_Index = Internet_Index.rename(columns = {
    "Access_Index" : "Internet_Access_Index",
    "Affordability_Index" : "Internet_Affordability_Index",
    "Quality_Index" : "Internet_Quality_Index"
})

In [400]:
Digital_Transformation_Index = EGOV_Index.merge(
    Internet_Index,
    on = ["Code_ID", "Country_Code", "Country", "Year"],
    how = "outer"
).merge(
    Digital_Payments_Index,
    on = ["Code_ID", "Country_Code", "Country", "Year"],
    how = "outer"
).merge(
    Financial_Inclusion_Index,
    on = ["Code_ID", "Country_Code", "Country", "Year"],
    how = "outer"
)

In [405]:
# Digital Transformation Analysis and Insights:

# 1- Digital Transformation And Financial Inclusion Overview:

# Whats is the overall Status and evolution of Digital Transformation an Financial Inclusion over time?

# KpI`s

# 1- Digital transformation Level:

DT_Level = Digital_Transformation_Index.groupby("Country_Code")["Digital_Transformation_Index"
].mean().reset_index().sort_values(by = "Digital_Transformation_Index", ascending = False).reset_index(drop = True)
In [406]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
In [407]:
# tranformation column Year to numeric:

Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"] = pd.to_numeric(Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"])

In [417]:
# Charts:

# 1- E-GOV Development Trend Over Time:

EGOV_Trend = Digital_Transformation_Index.pivot_table(
    index = "Year",
    columns = "Country_Code",
    values = "E_GOV_Index",
    aggfunc = "mean"
)

ax = EGOV_Trend.plot(
    figsize = (8,5),
    marker = "o",
    linewidth = 2
)

# Colors :
for line in ax.get_lines():
    country = line.get_label()

    if country == "EGY":
        line.set_color("#FF2E63")

    elif country == "ARE":
        line.set_color("#FF3838")

    elif country == "IND":
        line.set_color("#08D9D6")

    elif country == "GBR":
        line.set_color("#DC0000")

    elif country == "SAU":
        line.set_color("#EAEAEA")

#  Background :
plt.gcf().set_facecolor("#000000")
ax.set_facecolor("#000000")

# Title :
plt.title(
    "E-GOV Development Trend Over Time",
    color="#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    fontweight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)

# Labbels:
ax.set_xlabel(
    "Year",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Avg_EGOV_Index",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)


# Legend :
legend = plt.legend(facecolor = "black")
for text in legend.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

legend.get_title().set_color("#EAEAEA")

# Frame : 
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")

#  Ticks :
ax.tick_params(colors = "#EAEAEA")
In [418]:
# 2- Internet Penetration Trend Over Time:

Internet_Penetration_Trend = Digital_Transformation_Index.pivot_table(
    index = "Year",
    columns = "Country_Code",
    values = "Internet_Index",
    aggfunc = "mean"
)

ax = Internet_Penetration_Trend.plot(
    figsize = (8,5),
    marker = "o",
    linewidth = 2
)

# Colors :
for line in ax.get_lines():
    country = line.get_label()

    if country == "EGY":
        line.set_color("#FF3838")

    elif country == "ARE":
        line.set_color("#FF2E63")

    elif country == "IND":
        line.set_color("#08D9D6")

    elif country == "GBR":
        line.set_color("#DC0000")

    elif country == "SAU":
        line.set_color("#EAEAEA")

#  Background :
plt.gcf().set_facecolor("#000000")
ax.set_facecolor("#000000")

# Title :
plt.title(
    "Internet Penetration Trend Over Time",
    color="#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    fontweight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)

# Labbels:
ax.set_xlabel(
    "Year",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Avg_Internet_Penetration_Index",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

# Legend :
legend = plt.legend(facecolor = "black")
for text in legend.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

legend.get_title().set_color("#EAEAEA")

# Frame : 
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")

#  Ticks :
ax.tick_params(colors = "#EAEAEA")
In [419]:
# 3- Digital Payments Adoption Trend Over Time:

Digital_Payments_Trend = Digital_Transformation_Index.pivot_table(
    index = "Year",
    columns = "Country_Code",
    values = "Digital_Payments_Index",
    aggfunc = "mean"
)

ax = Digital_Payments_Trend.plot(
    figsize = (8,5),
    marker = "o",
    linewidth = 2
)

# Colors :
for line in ax.get_lines():
    country = line.get_label()

    if country == "EGY":
        line.set_color("#FF3838")

    elif country == "ARE":
        line.set_color("#FF2E63")

    elif country == "IND":
        line.set_color("#08D9D6")

    elif country == "GBR":
        line.set_color("#DC0000")

    elif country == "SAU":
        line.set_color("#EAEAEA")

#  Background :
plt.gcf().set_facecolor("#000000")
ax.set_facecolor("#000000")

# Title :
plt.title(
    "Digital Payments Trend Over Time",
    color="#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    fontweight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)

# Labbels:
ax.set_xlabel(
    "Year",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Avg_Digital_Payments_Index",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

# Legend :
legend = plt.legend(
    facecolor = "black",
    loc = "center left",
    bbox_to_anchor = (1, 0.5)
)

for text in legend.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

legend.get_title().set_color("#EAEAEA")


# Frame : 
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")

#  Ticks :
ax.tick_params(colors = "#EAEAEA")
In [420]:
# 4- Financial Inclusion Trend Over Time:

Financial_Inclusion_Trend = Digital_Transformation_Index.pivot_table(
    index = "Year",
    columns = "Country_Code",
    values = "FI_Index",
    aggfunc = "mean"
)

ax = Financial_Inclusion_Trend.plot(
    figsize = (8,5),
    marker = "o",
    linewidth = 2
)

# Colors :
for line in ax.get_lines():
    country = line.get_label()

    if country == "EGY":
        line.set_color("#FF3838")

    elif country == "ARE":
        line.set_color("#FF2E63")

    elif country == "IND":
        line.set_color("#08D9D6")

    elif country == "GBR":
        line.set_color("#DC0000")

    elif country == "SAU":
        line.set_color("#EAEAEA")

#  Background :
plt.gcf().set_facecolor("#000000")
ax.set_facecolor("#000000")

# Title :
plt.title(
    "Financial Inclusion Trend Over Time",
    color="#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    fontweight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)

# Labbels:
ax.set_xlabel(
    "Year",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Avg_FI_Index",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

# Legend :
legend = plt.legend(
    facecolor = "black",
    loc = "center left",
    bbox_to_anchor = (1, 0.5)
)

for text in legend.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

legend.get_title().set_color("#EAEAEA")

# Frame : 
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")

#  Ticks :
ax.tick_params(colors = "#EAEAEA")

In [424]:
# Charts:

# 1- E-Government Performance Across Countries:

E_Government_Performance_by_Countries = Digital_Transformation_Index.groupby("Country_Code")["E_GOV_Index"
].mean().sort_values(ascending = False)

plt.figure(figsize = (8,5), facecolor = "black")

ax = E_Government_Performance_by_Countries.plot(
    kind = "bar",
    color = "#FF2E63",
    edgecolor = "#FF2E63",
    label = "E_GOV_Index"
)

ax.set_facecolor("black")
ax.bar_label(ax.containers[0], color="#08D9D6")

plt.title(
    "E-Government Performance Across Countries",
    color = "#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    weight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)

plt.xticks(rotation = 0, color = "#EAEAEA")
plt.yticks(color = "#EAEAEA")


ax.spines["bottom"].set_color("white")
ax.spines["left"].set_color("white")


for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")
    spine.set_linewidth(1)

# Labbels:
ax.set_xlabel(
    "Country_Code",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Avg_EGOV_Index",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)
Out[424]:
Text(0, 0.5, 'Avg_EGOV_Index')

In [430]:
# 3- Digital Transformaion Growth (Relative Growth)مقدار سرعة التغيير %:

First_4_Years = Digital_Transformation_Index[Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"].between(2015, 2018)
].groupby("Country_Code")["Digital_Transformation_Index"].mean()

Last_4_Years = Digital_Transformation_Index[Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"].between(2021, 2024)
].groupby("Country_Code")["Digital_Transformation_Index"].mean()


Digital_Transformation_Growth_Percentage = (
    (Last_4_Years - First_4_Years)/ First_4_Years) * 100 

print(Digital_Transformation_Growth_Percentage)
    

Country_Code
ARE    14.181715
EGY    -8.182107
GBR    -9.578499
IND    88.125214
SAU    12.747431
Name: Digital_Transformation_Index, dtype: float64
In [431]:
# 3- Digital Transformaion Growth (Absolute Growth)حجم التغيير:

Digital_Transformation_Growth = (Last_4_Years - First_4_Years)

print(Digital_Transformation_Growth)

Country_Code
ARE    0.104371
EGY   -0.032545
GBR   -0.082857
IND    0.188307
SAU    0.080597
Name: Digital_Transformation_Index, dtype: float64
In [432]:
# 4- Financial Inclusion Growth (Relative Growth) مقدار سرعة التغيير %:

FI_data = Digital_Transformation_Index.sort_values(["Country_Code", "Year"]).copy()

FI_data = FI_data.dropna(subset = ["FI_Index"])

First_Year = (FI_data.groupby("Country_Code")["FI_Index"].first())

Last_Year = (FI_data.groupby("Country_Code")["FI_Index"].last())

FI_Growth_Percentage = (
    (Last_Year - First_Year)/ First_Year) * 100

print(FI_Growth_Percentage)

Country_Code
ARE    -28.308661
EGY    149.454424
GBR      1.726847
IND     25.068169
SAU     44.946990
Name: FI_Index, dtype: float64
In [433]:
# 4- Financial Inclusion Growth (Absolute Growth) حجم التغيير:

FI_Growth = (Last_Year - First_Year)
print(FI_Growth)

Country_Code

EGY    0.081352
GBR    0.016863
IND    0.108533
SAU    0.184631
Name: FI_Index, dtype: float64
In [434]:
# 5- Main Drivers of Financial Inclusion:

Index_Level_Data = Digital_Transformation_Index.groupby("Country_Code")[[
    "E_GOV_Index",
    "Internet_Index",
    "Digital_Payments_Index",
    "FI_Index"
]].mean()

Corr = Index_Level_Data.corr()

Main_Dirver = Corr["FI_Index"].drop("FI_Index").sort_values(ascending = False)

Main_Dirver
Out[434]:
Digital_Payments_Index    0.916180
E_GOV_Index               0.859543
Internet_Index            0.634475
Name: FI_Index, dtype: float64
In [435]:
# Charts:
# 1 - E-Government Vs Financial Inclusion: 
# Does EGOV impact on Finacial Inclusion?

x = Index_Level_Data["E_GOV_Index"]
y = Index_Level_Data["FI_Index"]

# Figure :
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize = (8, 5))

# Scatter Plot :
ax.scatter(
    x,
    y,
    color = "#08D9D6",
)

# Trendline :
m, b = np.polyfit(x, y, 1)

ax.plot(
    x,
    m * x + b,
    color = "#FF2E63",
    linewidth = 2,
    label = "Trendline"
)

# Correlation :
r = np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1]

# R Squared :
r_squared = r ** 2


ax.text(
    0.95,
    0.05,
    f"R = {r:.2f}\nR² = {r_squared:.2f}",
    transform = ax.transAxes,
    fontsize = 11,
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    horizontalalignment = "right",
    verticalalignment = "bottom",
    bbox = dict(
        facecolor = "black",
        edgecolor = "#FF2E63",
        boxstyle = "round,pad=0.5"
    )
)


# Labels :
ax.set_xlabel(
    "E-Government",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

ax.set_ylabel(
    "Financial Inclusion",
    color = "#EAEAEA",
    fontsize = 12
)

# Title :
ax.set_title(
    "E-Government Vs Financial Inclusion",
    color = "#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 16,
    fontweight = "bold",
    pad = 15
)


for text in legend.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

# Frame :
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")

# Ticks :
ax.tick_params(colors = "#FF2E63")

# Background :
fig.patch.set_facecolor("black")
ax.set_facecolor("black")
In [436]:

In [439]:
# 4- Growth Of Digital Transformation And Financial Inclusion:

# Which Digital transformation Indicators and financial inclusion have grown the fastest over time?						

# KpI`s

# 1- Digital Transformation Growth (Absolute Growth) حجم التغيير:

first_4_year = Digital_Transformation_Index[Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"].between(2015, 2018)
].groupby("Country_Code")["Digital_Transformation_Index"].mean()

last_4_year = Digital_Transformation_Index[Digital_Transformation_Index["Year"].between(2021, 2024)
].groupby("Country_Code")["Digital_Transformation_Index"].mean()

Digital_Transformation_Growth = (last_4_year - first_4_year)

print(Digital_Transformation_Growth)

Country_Code

EGY   -0.032545
GBR   -0.082857
IND    0.188307
SAU    0.080597

# 1- Digital Transformation Growth (Relative Growth) مقدار سرعة التغيير %:

    (last_4_year - first_4_year) / (first_4_year)) * 100

print(Digital_Transformation_Growth_Percetage)

In [443]:
# 3- EGOV Growth (Absolute Growth) حجم التغيير:

EGOV_Data = Digital_Transformation_Index[["Country_Code", "Year", "E_GOV_Index"]].dropna()

Avg_First_Years = EGOV_Data[EGOV_Data["Year"].between(2016, 2018)
].groupby("Country_Code")["E_GOV_Index"].mean()

Avg_Last_Years = EGOV_Data[EGOV_Data["Year"].between(2022, 2024)
].groupby("Country_Code")["E_GOV_Index"].mean()

EGOV_Growth = (Avg_Last_Years - Avg_First_Years)

print(EGOV_Growth)

GBR    0.026183
IND    0.112713
SAU    0.210002

    (Avg_Last_Years - Avg_First_Years) / (Avg_First_Years)) * 100

print(EGOV_Growth_Percentage)

In [449]:
# Charts:
# Growth Comparaison Across Indicators:
# Does growth in the Digital Transformationindicators lead to growth in Financial Inclusion?

# Prepare Data Frame for all indivators instead of Series:

All_Indicators_Growth = pd.DataFrame({
    "EGOV_Growth" : EGOV_Growth,
    "Internet_Growth" : Internet_Growth,
    "Digital_Payments_Growth" : Digital_Payments_Growth,
    "FI_Growth" : FI_Growth
})

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize = (12,6), facecolor = "black")

All_Indicators_Growth.plot(
    kind = "bar",
    ax = ax,
    color = ["#08D9D6", "#C40C0C", "#EAEAEA", "#D02752"],
)

# خلفية
ax.set_facecolor("black")

# Title
ax.set_title(
    "Growth Comparison Across Indicators",
    color = "#08D9D6",
    fontsize = 20,
    weight = "bold",
    pad = 10
)

# Labels
ax.set_xlabel("Country", color = "#EAEAEA")
ax.set_ylabel("Growth Value", color = "#EAEAEA")

# Ticks
plt.xticks(rotation = 0, color = "#EAEAEA")
plt.yticks(color = "#EAEAEA")

# Legend
leg = ax.legend(loc = "lower right", bbox_to_anchor = (1, 0))
for text in leg.get_texts():
    text.set_color("#EAEAEA")

leg.get_frame().set_edgecolor("#FF2E63")
leg.get_frame().set_linewidth(1.5)
leg.get_frame().set_facecolor("black")

# Bar Labels 
for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(
        container,
        color = "#EAEAEA",
        fontsize = 7,
        padding = 5,
        fmt = "%.3f"
    )

# Spines (Frame)
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color("#FF2E63")
    spine.set_linewidth(1)

# EGOV Correlation and Regression:

x = Index_Level_Data["E_GOV_Index"]
y = Index_Level_Data["FI_Index"]

r = np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1]
r_squared = r ** 2

EGOV_metrics = pd.DataFrame({
    "EGOV_Metric": ["R", "R²"],
    "Value": [r, r_squared]
})

EGOV_metrics

EGOV_metrics.to_csv(
    r"D:\مبادرة رواد مصر الرقمية\Technical\Final Project\Digital_Transformation_Index_Project\Python Analysis and Insights\DTI_Analysis_and_Insights\EGOV_Corr_and_Regression.csv",
    index = False, encoding = "utf-8-sig")

r_squared = r ** 2

    "Value": [r, r_squared]
})
